page.title: Translations
page.description: Edit locale-specific overrides without changing the source JSON files.

filters.globalSearchPlaceholder: Search across all locales and namespaces

summary.title: Default JSON + database override
summary.description: Rows come from the source JSON file. Save an override to replace the default value at runtime. Reset removes the override and falls back to the file value.
summary.mergeDescription: Merge only the keys from the imported JSON into the current namespace overrides.
summary.replaceDescription: Clear all overrides in the current namespace first, then write the imported JSON as the new overrides.

messages.importEmpty: The imported JSON does not contain any translatable leaf values.
messages.noRows: No translatable values found for the selected namespace.
messages.noSearchResults: No translation rows match the current search.
messages.noGlobalSearchResults: No matches were found across the available namespaces.
